## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (requires migration notes below)
- [ ] Docs / tooling only

## Checklist

- [ ] I've added a `## [Unreleased]` entry to `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] I've run `bun run lint` and `cargo clippy` with no new warnings
- [ ] I've tested on macOS (or noted which platforms were tested)
- [ ] New Tauri commands have capability entries in `capabilities/default.json`
- [ ] Design tokens — no hardcoded colour/size values in components
- [ ] Hooks / features have barrel exports in their `index.ts`
